signals.npcLine: Crypto pulse rising, but fear clogs the streets.
signals.questPulse: Scan for shadow trades amid market chaos.
signals.worldFeed: Thousands of tokens buzz, but doubt lingers.
signals.clueEvent: Unstable cap shifts hint at hidden moves.

signals.npcLine: RAVE and ASTEROID flicker on underground boards.
signals.worldFeed: Unknown coins gain sudden hype, eyes peeled.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual trading volume spikes in fringe tokens.

signals.npcLine: Fear index climbs; trust your cyber instincts.
signals.questPulse: Track market fear shadows before they strike.
signals.worldFeed: Sentiment drops; digital traders grow jittery.
signals.clueEvent: Rising anxiety signals potential market breach.

signals.npcLine: PENGU and AAVE whisper of shifting alliances.
signals.questPulse: Follow token trails into the neon abyss.
signals.worldFeed: Silent moves under bright cyber neon glow.
signals.clueEvent: Trending coins hint at new underground factions.

signals.npcLine: Watch ARB’s rise; it’s a signal from shadows.
signals.questPulse: Investigate creeping influence among digital currencies.
signals.worldFeed: Low-key coin stirs rumors in nether markets.
signals.clueEvent: Subtle shift in token power dynamics detected.
